title: Joint TAL/RDY Hearing: Modernization of the Organic Industrial Base
description: The subcommittees on Tactical Air & Land Forces (TAL) and Readiness (RDY) will receive testimony from senior Army officials regarding plans and ongoing efforts to modernize the Army’s organic industrial base.
text:
The subcommittees on Tactical Air & Land Forces (TAL) and Readiness (RDY) will receive testimony from senior Army officials regarding plans and ongoing efforts to modernize the Army’s organic industrial base.
Opening Statements:
Rep. Wittman Opening Statement
Rep. Bergman Opening Statement
Witnesses & Opening Testimonies:
The Honorable Brent Ingraham
Assistant Secretary of the Army for Acquisition, Sustainment, and Technology
Department of the Army
Lieutenant General Chris Mohan, USA
Commanding General
U.S. Army Materiel Command
Major General John Reim, USA
Joint Program Executive Office Armaments & Ammunition and the Commanding General, Picatinny Arsenal
Department of the Army
